user_story.i_want: automated daily portfolio performance reports delivered to my email inbox at 7 AM EST
user_story.so_that: I can review client portfolio performance before market open and prepare for client conversations

personas.needs: Automated delivery of portfolio performance data at a specific time to enable timely client service and investment decision-making
Audit trail of all automated report generation and delivery to ensure regulatory compliance and data access monitoring
Ability to configure, monitor, and troubleshoot the automated report delivery system including scheduling and email delivery status

functional_requirements.requirement: The system shall generate portfolio performance reports automatically at 7:00 AM Eastern Standard Time daily
